title: 10 best herbal creams for hematuria

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Bearberry creams helps with hematuria because they contain a unique blend of natural ingredients that work together to soothe and calm the urinary tract. The primary active compound, uva-ursi extract, has anti-inflammatory properties that reduce redness and swelling in the bladder and urethra. Additionally, bearberry's natural antibacterial agents help eliminate harmful bacteria that can exacerbate hematuria symptoms. As a result, bearberry creams provide relief from painful urination, frequency, and urgency associated with hematuria, promoting overall urinary health and comfort.
remedy_properties: Astringent properties: Bearberry cream's astringent properties help to reduce the frequency and amount of urine excreted, which can alleviate symptoms of hematuria such as frequent urination.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Bearberry's antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds help to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, which can contribute to hematuria, and protect against oxidative stress that may exacerbate the condition.

Urinary antiseptic properties: Bearberry cream's antibacterial and antifungal properties help to inhibit the growth of harmful bacteria and fungi that may be present in the urine, reducing the risk of infection and inflammation that can contribute to hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots contain a high concentration of tannins, which help to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain in cases of hematuria.
Barks: Bearberry bark is rich in flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory properties and help soothe the urinary tract.
remedy_recipe: Harvest arctostaphylos uva ursi leaves in late summer when ripe and shade-dry them for 24 hours.
Combine 50g of dried uva ursi leaves with 250ml of olive oil in a clean glass jar and infuse for 14 days.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth to separate the infused oil from the plant material, discarding solids.
Mix 100ml of the infused oil with 10g of beeswax and 20ml of coconut oil, heating gently until the wax melts.
Pour the cream into a sterilized container and let it cool and thicken before use within 30 days.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow creams helps with hematuria because they soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the urinary tract, reducing inflammation and irritation. The gel-like substance in marshmallows, called mucilage, forms a protective barrier that shields the bladder lining from further irritation, allowing it to heal naturally. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of marshmallow creams help to reduce bleeding and alleviate symptoms associated with hematuria, making them a natural and effective remedy for this condition.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal marshmallow creams contain anti-inflammatory compounds like mucilages, which soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the urinary tract, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with hematuria.

Soothing and protective effects on mucous membranes: The mucilages in herbal marshmallow creams help to form a protective barrier on the lining of the urinary tract, reducing irritation and inflammation, and providing relief from burning sensations and pain associated with hematuria.

Antioxidant properties: Herbal marshmallow creams contain antioxidants that help to neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress in the body, which can contribute to the development of hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the marshmallow plant are rich in mucilage, a thick, protective substance that helps soothe and calm irritated tissues, making it effective in treating hematuria.
Rhyzomes: Marshmallow rhyzomes contain high amounts of glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation and pain associated with hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality althaea officinalis flowers and dry them in a warm oven at 50°c for two hours.
Combine dried marigold petals with coconut oil in a 1:2 ratio by weight, mixing thoroughly for five minutes.
Steep the herb-oil mixture in a double boiler at 60-70°c for one hour, allowing the herbs to infuse into the oil.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass container, pressing on the solids to extract as much oil as possible.
Whip the extracted oil with beeswax and aloe vera gel in a 1:0.2:0.8 ratio by weight, whipping until it thickens into a smooth cream within 10 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenrod creams helps with hematuria because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The herb's active compounds, including flavonoids and terpenoids, help to soothe and calm irritated bladder tissues, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with frequent urination. Antibacterial property: Goldenrod cream's antibacterial property helps to combat bacterial infections that may be contributing to hematuria, reducing the risk of complications such as kidney damage or sepsis.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat urinary tract issues, making them a valuable ingredient in creams for hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Collect high-quality dried solidago virgaurea leaves in sufficient quantity for preparation.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder.
Mix one part of the powdered solidago virgaurea with two parts of coconut oil and heat the mixture at low temperature.
Stir the mixture constantly until the powder is fully incorporated and the cream has reached a smooth consistency after 30 minutes of preparation time.
Strain the cream through cheesecloth or a coffee filter to remove any impurities and store it in an airtight container for future use.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of portulaca oleracea leaves and stems.
Dry the plant material in a well-ventilated area for 7-10 days.
Grind 50 grams of dried portulaca oleracea into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Mix 20 grams of the powdered herb with 100 milliliters of coconut oil and 20 milliliters of beeswax in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the beeswax is fully melted.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh zea mays leaves and chop them into small pieces.
Infuse chopped zea mays leaves in boiling water for 10 minutes.
Strain the infusion and combine with beeswax and coconut oil.
Whisk the mixture until it reaches a smooth consistency.
Transfer the cream to an airtight container and store in the refrigerator.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort creams helps with hematuria because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which aid in reducing bleeding and discomfort caused by the condition. remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh st john's wort flowers and leaves in the morning after dew has dried ensuring optimal potency.
Dry the harvested material by spreading it thinly on paper bags or trays in a warm dry dark area for 7-10 days.
Grind the dried herbs into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle to release active compounds.
Mix the powdered herb with sweet almond oil and beeswax at a ratio of 1:2:0.5 by weight and heat the mixture in a double boiler until melted.
Strain the cooled mixture through cheesecloth into sterilized jars filling them to the brim and seal tightly for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice creams helps with hematuria because they contain compounds like glycyrrhizin and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, which is often a contributing factor to hematuria. remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the powdered glycyrrhiza glabra with 200ml of sweet almond oil and 20ml of beeswax in a double boiler over low heat for 30 minutes.
Add 10ml of vitamin e oil and stir well to combine, then remove from heat and let cool for 1 hour.
Whip the mixture using an electric mixer until it reaches a smooth and creamy consistency, taking approximately 5 minutes.
Pour the cream into sterilized containers and store in the refrigerator at a temperature below 40°f for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Saw palmetto creams helps with hematuria because they provide targeted relief for inflamed and irritated urinary tract tissues. remedy_recipe: Collect high-quality dried serenoa repens leaves in an airtight container to ensure freshness.
Measure out 200 grams of dried leaves and grind them into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar pestle.
Combine the ground leaf powder with 100 grams of sweet almond oil, 50 grams of coconut oil, and 20 grams of beeswax in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the beeswax is fully melted and the mixture reaches a temperature of 160°f to 180°f.
Remove the double boiler from the heat and let it cool slightly before pouring the cream into sterilized jars and storing them in the refrigerator for up to six months.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of fresh dandelion root and clean it thoroughly under cold running water.

Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter to remove any solids and allow it to cool before transferring to an airtight container.

remedy_recipe: Gather and dry 50g of pomegranate flowers punica granatum in the shade for 3 days.
Grind 20g of dried pomegranate flowers into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold creams helps with hematuria because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The cream's active compounds, such as saponins and flavonoids, have been shown to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract and alleviate discomfort associated with bleeding. By soothing and calming the affected area, pot marigold creams provide relief from the burning sensation and pain often experienced during hematuria, allowing individuals to manage their condition more effectively and improve their overall quality of life.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Pot marigold cream's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as flavonoids and terpenes, help reduce swelling and discomfort associated with hematuria.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant activity of pot marigold cream's bioactive compounds, including carotenoids and polyphenols, helps neutralize free radicals that can damage kidney tissue and exacerbate bleeding.

Wound-healing and tissue-protective properties: Pot marigold cream's ability to promote wound healing and protect tissues from further damage may help reduce the severity of hematuria and prevent complications.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots contain triterpenoid saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making them effective in reducing inflammation and preventing infection associated with hematuria.

Barks: The barks of the pot marigold plant contain flavonoids, which have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria that can contribute to urinary tract infections (UTIs), a common cause of hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest calendula flowers at peak bloom and dry them thoroughly for use in the cream recipe.
Combine one part dried calendula flowers with three parts carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil.
Steep the herb mixture in a heat-proof container for 6 to 8 weeks, shaking occasionally, to extract oils.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth and mix it with beeswax and vitamin e oil in a ratio of 1:2.
Whip the mixture until smooth and creamy, then pour into containers and store in a cool dark place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Roselle creams help with hematuria because they contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that soothe and protect the urinary tract. The herbs in roselle, such as Hibiscus sabdariffa, have been traditionally used to treat various bladder issues, including inflammation and irritation. By reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, roselle creams may help alleviate the discomfort and pain associated with hematuria, allowing for a more comfortable and normal urination process. This natural remedy has shown promise in reducing the severity and frequency of bleeding episodes in individuals affected by hematuria.
remedy_properties: Astringent and anti-inflammatory properties: These properties help reduce inflammation and shrink swollen blood vessels in the urinary tract, which can contribute to hematuria.
Antioxidant activity: Herbal Roselle creams contain antioxidants that neutralize free radicals and prevent oxidative damage to the urinary tract lining, reducing the risk of bleeding and irritation.

Uroprotective and antispasmodic properties: These properties help soothe and calm the urinary tract, relaxing muscle spasms that can contribute to hematuria, and protecting the bladder and urethra from further irritation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, roots are effective in reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of hematuria.
Rhyzomes: Containing bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, rhyzomes exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them useful for treating hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried hibiscus sabdariffa flowers measuring 20-30 grams and grind them into fine powder using mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Combine the powdered hibiscus sabdariffa with 100 milliliters of distilled water in a heat-resistant mixing bowl to create a decoction for 30 minutes.
Filter the decoction through cheesecloth or a coffee filter to separate the liquid from the solids, retaining 50 milliliters of the extracted solution.
Mix the filtered solution with 10 grams of beeswax and 5 milliliters of coconut oil in a double boiler for 30 minutes until the mixture reaches 65-70 degrees celsius.
Pour the cooled cream mixture into sterilized glass jars, seal tightly, and store in the refrigerator at 4-6 degrees celsius to maintain potency and shelf life for up to two weeks.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for hematuria are topical solutions that utilize natural ingredients to soothe and heal urinary tract irritations, providing relief from painful and recurring episodes. These creams often combine herbs like Marshmallow root, Cornsilk, and Uva Ursi, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, helping to reduce inflammation, ease discomfort, and promote healing. By applying these creams directly to the affected area, individuals with hematuria can experience a significant reduction in symptoms, allowing them to resume their daily activities with greater comfort and confidence.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat hematuria with herbal creams is to apply a soothing cream containing calendula, chamomile, and plantain extracts. These herbs have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help reduce discomfort, alleviate pain, and prevent infection. Mix the cream with coconut oil or olive oil and apply it topically to the affected area two to three times a day for optimal results.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hematuria that are treated with herbal creams are skin irritations, rashes, and inflammation. For instance, eczema, psoriasis, and dermatitis can be alleviated by topical applications of herbs like aloe vera, chamomile, and calendula. These natural remedies help soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and itching associated with these conditions. They may also aid in healing damaged skin tissues and promoting overall skin health.
